total_object_count: How many objects are in the scene?
Count every object shown. How many are there?
What is the total number of visible objects?
How many small objects are visible?
type_count: How many {target_object_plural} are in the cluster?
Count the {target_object_plural} in the cluster. How many are there?
What is the total number of {target_object_plural} visible in the cluster?
How many {target_object_plural} are present in the cluster?
type_and_color_count: How many {target_property_phrase} are in the cluster?
Count the {target_property_phrase} in the cluster. How many are there?
What is the total number of visible {target_property_phrase} in the cluster?
How many {target_property_phrase} are present in the cluster?
color_count: How many {target_color_name} objects are in the cluster?
Count the {target_color_name} objects in the cluster. How many are there?
What is the total number of visible {target_color_name} objects in the cluster?
type_or_color_count: How many objects are {target_object_plural} or {target_color_name} objects? Count each object once.
Count every clustered object that is a {target_object_name} or is {target_color_name}. How many are there?
What is the number of objects matching either condition: {target_object_plural} or {target_color_name} objects?
How many objects are {target_object_plural} or {target_color_name} objects? Count overlaps once.
How many clustered objects satisfy at least one condition: it is a {target_object_name}, or it is {target_color_name}?
type_xor_color_count: How many objects are exactly one of these: {target_object_plural} or {target_color_name} objects?
Count every clustered object that is a {target_object_name} or is {target_color_name}, but not both. How many are there?
What is the number of objects matching exactly one condition: {target_object_plural} or {target_color_name} objects?
How many objects are {target_object_plural} or {target_color_name} objects, excluding objects that are both?
How many clustered objects satisfy exactly one condition: it is a {target_object_name}, or it is {target_color_name}?
type_and_not_color_count: How many {target_object_plural} in the cluster are not {target_color_name}?
Count the clustered {target_object_plural} that are any color except {target_color_name}. How many are there?
What is the number of visible {target_object_plural} in the cluster that are not {target_color_name}?
How many clustered objects are {target_object_plural} and not {target_color_name}?
color_and_not_type_count: How many {target_color_name} objects in the cluster are not {target_object_plural}?
Count the {target_color_name} clustered objects that are not {target_object_plural}. How many are there?
What is the number of visible {target_color_name} objects whose type is not {target_object_name}?
How many clustered objects are {target_color_name} and not {target_object_plural}?
two_type_total_count: How many {left_operand_phrase} and {right_operand_phrase} are there in total?
What is the total count of {left_operand_phrase} and {right_operand_phrase}?
Count the {left_operand_phrase} and {right_operand_phrase}. What is the total?
Add the number of {left_operand_phrase} and {right_operand_phrase}. What is the total?
How many objects are in these two groups: {left_operand_phrase} and {right_operand_phrase}?
two_type_difference_count: What is the absolute difference between the number of {left_operand_phrase} and {right_operand_phrase}?
What is the difference between the counts of {left_operand_phrase} and {right_operand_phrase}?
Count the {left_operand_phrase} and {right_operand_phrase}. What is the count difference?
After subtracting the smaller count from the larger count for {left_operand_phrase} and {right_operand_phrase}, what is the difference?
What is the absolute count difference for {left_operand_phrase} and {right_operand_phrase}?
two_color_total_count: How many {left_operand_phrase} and {right_operand_phrase} are there in total?
What is the total count of {left_operand_phrase} and {right_operand_phrase}?
Count the {left_operand_phrase} and {right_operand_phrase}. What is the total?
Add the number of {left_operand_phrase} and {right_operand_phrase}. What is the total?
How many objects are in these two groups: {left_operand_phrase} and {right_operand_phrase}?
two_color_difference_count: What is the absolute difference between the number of {left_operand_phrase} and {right_operand_phrase}?
What is the difference between the counts of {left_operand_phrase} and {right_operand_phrase}?
Count the {left_operand_phrase} and {right_operand_phrase}. What is the count difference?
After subtracting the smaller count from the larger count for {left_operand_phrase} and {right_operand_phrase}, what is the difference?
What is the absolute count difference for {left_operand_phrase} and {right_operand_phrase}?

global.object_description: many small 3D objects arranged on a plain surface
global.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
global.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array containing one [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box around each counted object

task:object_cluster_count_arithmetic_que.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "left_operand" and "right_operand"; each value is an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel boxes around the objects in that operand group

task:object_cluster_counterfactual_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array containing one [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box around each starting visible object matching the queried property before the edits
